name: webtop
title: Ubuntu Webtop
description: Ubuntu desktop environment in your browser

defaultEnv.description: User ID the desktop runs as; files in /config are owned by this UID. Match the host user that owns the app data dir.
defaultEnv.label: User ID (PUID)

defaultEnv.description: Group ID the desktop runs as. Match the host group that owns the app data dir.
defaultEnv.label: Group ID (PGID)

defaultEnv.description: Timezone for the desktop, e.g. America/New_York.
defaultEnv.label: Timezone

elevated.reason: The Ubuntu desktop needs sudo for installing packages (apt) and administering the environment. Without it, Hola's default no-new-privileges hardening blocks sudo entirely.
